attacking_style: Pure sprinter who excels in chaotic finales without traditional leadouts, launching center-road at 100-150m with deceptive late acceleration that appears mid-sprint fatigue before devastating final kick.
team_tactics: Increasingly self-sufficient positioning; early career relied on structured leadouts (SCULLY, SINKELDAM) but evolved to wheel-surfing rivals and launching independently. Team often shows dual-option vulnerability when GANNA or others contest.
terrain_preference: Flat to slightly uphill drags (best power sustainment on gradients). Excels in wet/chaotic conditions with superior positioning through crash zones. Struggles when pure leadout positioning required through tight final corners.
vulnerability: Illness derailed multiple Grand Tour campaigns (abandoned 2023 Giro mid-race twice noted). Positioning breakdowns into final corners when under tactical pressure. Early launches from distance sometimes backfire despite raw speed.
key_patterns: Won 7+ observed sprints, majority without clean leadout, exploiting chaos better than organized trains
Strategic intermediate sprint hunting for points classification, often abandoning stages post-sprint (4+ instances)
Superior wet-weather and crash-zone navigation skills, won maiden Giro through dual crash points
Illness vulnerability: abandoned/struggled with sickness in 3+ separate race blocks at Giro 2023
Deceptive sprint acceleration: appears to tire mid-effort then devastating final 100m kick (3+ wins)
Excels uphill sprint finishes with sustained power on gradients, timing attacks final 25m
form_trajectory: positive: Won Vuelta 2023 green jersey with 3 stage wins, peaked late in Grand Tour showing consistency and tactical maturity despite mid-race mechanical/team fatigue struggles
